title: Change date format in emails
excerpt:
If you currently use a date-placeholder in e-mails (e-mail & activities and automated e-mails) the format is english (f.e. 23rd October 2024) 
We’re sending out e-mails in german and having an english date format in the …

posts.author: Mavi (Teicke)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you currently use a date-placeholder in e-mails (e-mail & activities and automated e-mails) the format is english (f.e. 23rd October 2024)

We’re sending out e-mails in german and having an english date format in the e-mail looks pretty unprofessional.
It would be amazing if the date format in the e-mails could be editable into f.e. DD/MM/YYYY
